revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ihatokono Shrine
| native_name = 石徳高神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

| map_caption = Ihatokono Shrine

| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ihatokono Shrine'''|石徳高神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 51
** P155: {{ill|Kutsumino Shrine|lt=Kutsumino Shrine|qid=Q135039669|1=Kutsumino Shrine (Q135039669)}}
** P156: {{ill|Q134926830|ltq=Q134926830|qid=Q134926830|1=Ikamashi Shrine}}

* {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}}
